title: Rich Earthy Malaysian Kippers Noodles
description: A hearty Malaysian dish featuring kippers, mushrooms, and cheese, perfect for a hangover cure. This earthy and savory meal is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the noodles and cook according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender.
Add the soy sauce to the mushroom pan and stir to combine.
Add the canned kippers to the mushroom pan, breaking them up with a spoon as they cook.
Drain the cooked noodles and add them to the mushroom and kipper pan.
Stir in the shredded cheese until it is melted and well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional cheese if desired.
